input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.3.4
            TITLE: a team found to be improperly presenting any evidence of the manufacturing process may be

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.3.4: A team found to be improperly presenting any evidence of the manufacturing process may be
IN.8.3.4 A team found to be improperly presenting any evidence of the manufacturing process may be 
barred from competing with a monocoque.

final_answer: A team found to be improperly presenting any evidence of the manufacturing process may be barred from competing with a monocoque.
